West Leederville is about 8.9 km south-east of our Innaloo clinic, roughly 11 minutes by car via Woolwich St, Kimberley St, and Lake Monger Dr. Our practice at 3/8 Odin Rd, Innaloo has ground-floor entry and parking right at the door, so there are no stairs to manage after your {{procedure_ref}}.

West Leederville patients receiving IV sedation for their {{service_context}} will need someone to drive them home afterward. Procedures under local anaesthetic won't restrict you from driving. If you're given a script for antibiotics or pain relief, Chemist Warehouse Innaloo at 380A Scarborough Beach Rd is just near the practice.

We welcome referrals from GPs across the Stirling area. Contact our practice for a referral pack.

blocks.heading: Getting to Odin House Dental from West Perth
blocks.geo_block:
From West Perth, our Innaloo practice is approximately 9.7 km north-west and about 10 minutes by car via Sutherland St and Railway St. You'll find us at 3/8 Odin Rd, Innaloo, where ground-floor access and front-door parking mean no obstacles after your {{procedure_ref}}.

If your {{service_context}} involves IV sedation, you'll need someone to drive you back to West Perth once the appointment is done. Local anaesthetic patients are fine to drive themselves. Any prescribed antibiotics or pain relief can be collected from Chemist Warehouse Innaloo at 380A Scarborough Beach Rd on your way out.

We welcome referrals from GPs across the Stirling area. Contact our practice for a referral pack.

blocks.heading: Getting to Odin House Dental from Westminster
blocks.geo_block:
Westminster is about 7.7 km north-east of our Innaloo practice, roughly 14 minutes by car via Arkana Rd, Wanneroo Rd, and State Route 60. Our clinic is at 3/8 Odin Rd, Innaloo. It's ground floor with parking directly out front, so there are no stairs or lifts to deal with after your {{procedure_ref}}.

If you're having IV sedation for your {{service_context}}, you'll need someone to drive you home to Westminster afterward. For procedures under local anaesthetic, you're fine to drive yourself. If you're prescribed antibiotics or pain relief after your appointment, Chemist Warehouse Innaloo at 380A Scarborough Beach Rd is on your way home.

We welcome referrals from GPs across the Stirling area. Contact our practice for a referral pack.

blocks.heading: Getting to Odin House Dental from Woodlands
blocks.geo_block:
Woodlands is only 1.4 km south of our practice, putting Odin House Dental just 3 minutes away by car via Rosewood Ave, Birchwood Ave, and Bowra Ave. At 3/8 Odin Rd, Innaloo, we offer ground-floor access with parking right outside, so getting in and out after your {{procedure_ref}} is simple.

Because Woodlands is so close, arranging a driver for IV sedation during your {{service_context}} is especially easy. Under local anaesthetic, you can drive yourself home without any issue. Should you need antibiotics or pain relief, Chemist Warehouse Innaloo at 380A Scarborough Beach Rd is moments from the clinic.

We welcome referrals from GPs across the Stirling area. Contact our practice for a referral pack.

blocks.heading: Getting to Odin House Dental from Yokine
blocks.geo_block:
Yokine is around 6.4 km north-east of our Innaloo practice, approximately 13 minutes by car via Flinders St, Villiers St, and Royal St. We're located at 3/8 Odin Rd, Innaloo, with ground-floor entry and parking at the front door, so you won't have to navigate stairs after your {{procedure_ref}}.

Yokine patients who require IV sedation as part of their {{service_context}} will need a companion to handle the drive home. Local anaesthetic procedures won't affect your ability to drive back. If you're prescribed antibiotics or pain medication, Chemist Warehouse Innaloo at 380A Scarborough Beach Rd is right near the practice.

We welcome referrals from GPs across the Stirling area. Contact our practice for a referral pack.
